projects.name: specorator
projects.description: The Obsidian plugin that brings the full ecosystem together. Install it once and you get a ready-to-use AI development workspace: a 12-stage workflow, specialized AI agents for every phase, and every decision saved in plain files you own. Works for product managers, designers, founders, and developers alike. No coding required.

projects.name: specorator-runtime
projects.description: The integration library for developers who want to embed the Specorator workflow into their own applications. Provides the full agent lifecycle as a programmable API — no Obsidian plugin required.

projects.name: agentonomous
projects.description: The agent library for developers. The six AI roles that power specorator — PM, Architect, Engineering, QA, Review, and Writer — available as a standalone TypeScript package for your own applications.

projects.name: agentic-workflow
projects.description: The workflow engine that powers specorator, available as a standalone CLI tool for developers. Runs the full 12-stage development process through the terminal — bring the methodology into your own tooling without the Obsidian plugin.
